subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who caused the Sun of Glory to shine forth from the Horizon of Eternity, and by Whose effulgence the denizens of the highest realms were illumined [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی اشرق شمس البهاء عن مشرق البقاء و استضاء منه اهل ملا العالین
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment, @justice and wrath of God, @prayer for detachment, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @transcendence; unknowability of God
